description:
The Nextcloud Desktop Client is a tool to synchronize files from Nextcloud Server with your computer.

Use the desktop clients to keep your files synchronized between your Nextcloud server and your desktop.
Select one or more directories on your local machine and always have access to your latest files wherever you are.
What's Changed
- [stable-3.17] fix(macOS): report Success as the initial sync state for VFS by @backportbot[bot] in nextcloud/desktop#8581
- [stable-3.17] fix(cfapi): set up connections before requesting hydration by @backportbot[bot] in nextcloud/desktop#8583
- [stable-3.17] fix(cfapi): only log process info if it's present by @backportbot[bot] in nextcloud/desktop#8586
- [stable-3.17] fix(i18n): Fix grammar by @backportbot[bot] in nextcloud/desktop#8593
- Updated NextcloudFileProviderKit by @i2h3 in nextcloud/desktop#8601
- [stable-3.17] feat: set LocalizedResourceName for sync folders. by @backportbot[bot] in nextcloud/desktop#8613
Full Changelog: nextcloud/desktop@v3.17.0...v3.17.1
